introSection: Dare Devil was a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster previously located at J's Amusement Park in Guerneville, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride used to operate somewhere else before arriving in J's Amusement Park, this is evident because the Allan Herschell Company went defunct in 1970, 21 years before the opening of this coaster.

fullText:
Dare Devil was a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster previously located at J's Amusement Park in Guerneville, California, USA.

The ride used to operate somewhere else before arriving in J's Amusement Park, this is evident because the Allan Herschell Company went defunct in 1970, 21 years before the opening of this coaster.



Brown track and white supports.
